历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2021 (Science), the lowest ranking was approximately 12,585; in 2023 (Science), approximately 13,585; in 2024 (Physics Category), approximately 16,733; in 2025 (Physics Category), approximately 17,020. Overall, there is a trend of gradual backward movement, with a cumulative shift of about 4,435 places from 2021 to 2025. The pace of backward movement has slowed in recent years (only about 287 places from 2024 to 2025). The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 17,020; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 70 in 2024 and 70 in 2025, but the 2026 plan significantly expands to 90, an increase of about 28.6% compared to 2025. This substantial expansion theoretically reduces admission competition intensity, causing the ranking number to increase.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 75th in the Soft Science China University Main Ranking (2026), with stable rankings in the 70-75 range in recent years, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally. There are no significant negative or positive events recorded in the reputation file; Douyin popularity did not enter the top 100, indicating generally low attention; no discontinuation records in the filing anomaly file, suggesting stable application expectations. The university has traditional strengths in Geology and Geological Resources and Geological Engineering, with industry influence in the geoscience and mining fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly popular and recommended, aligning with the university's offerings in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Artificial Intelligence, potentially attracting more high-scoring applicants. The total number of regular college entrance exam takers in the province for 2026 is approximately 474,900, a slight increase from the combined total of about 472,480 for Physics Category (266,425) and History Category (206,055) in 2025, intensifying overall competition. Compared to 2024's 448 points, there is a decrease, but the impact of exam difficulty or score line adjustments on rankings is limited. The university is located in Beijing, a first-tier city, which has some regional appeal to Jiangxi candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the significant expansion of the Physics Category enrollment plan in 2026 by about 28.6% (increasing the ranking number), the slight increase in the total number of provincial candidates (intensifying competition), and the sustained high popularity of hot majors like Computer Science and Electrical Engineering, the expansion effect and the candidate increase effect offset each other. After accounting for the additional competitive pressure from the increase in candidates, a small upward adjustment of about 50 places is made. The predicted lowest ranking for the 2026 Physics Category is approximately 19,987, with a range of 19,487 to 20,487.

Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of 19,487 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Artificial Intelligence; candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (around 19,987) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors while also attempting Tier 1; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of 20,487 are advised to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net, while also considering majors like Geology (Energy) that have moderate social popularity.
